acceptedGaps: CommandBar surface chrome is rendered approximately; overflow, pointer states, and native spacing remain gaps.

rows.notes: Reviewed native WinUI, macOS runtime, and diff crops. Retained the documented source-level harness grade; nativeQualityGrade remains not-evaluated because the current renderer evidence does not establish native-quality WinUI parity. rows.nativeReferenceIntegrityBlockerReason: Native and macOS crop dimensions differ. Native crop is 723x48; macOS crop is 724x48. Phase -1 does not normalize crop sizes.
